economic_notes: First Nation operates 1239774 B.C. Ltd. as a GBE (100% owned, Dec 31 2022 revenue $1,275,946, loss $102,943). Consolidated entities include Bokecen Xaxe (Sacred) Society and 1228435 B.C. Ltd. Management fees of $211,000 charged to GBE.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Auditor firm name not explicitly stated — partners listed are from a Port Coquitlam CPA firm. Prior year (2022) included a massive one-time Hatch Point Settlement of $41,760,879, making prior revenue $55.3M vs current $8M. Significant prior period adjustments restated 2022 figures. Deferred revenue line is negative (-$802,532) representing recognition of previously deferred revenue. GBE (1239774 B.C. Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method. Specific land claims loan of $112,342 outstanding. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $3,643,364 + CMHC $60,225 + FNHA $886,388 + Gaming Revenue Sharing $474,079 + Coast Salish Employment $100,370 + FNESC $177,036 + DFO $1,258,914 + Province of BC $126,789 = $6,727,165 (approximately); OSR includes interest, earnings from GBE, other revenue, Ottawa Trust, rental, Legacy Trust, less deferred revenue recognition.
